title: hieracium canescens subsp. sublaeve
intro: Hieracium canescens subsp. sublaeve, a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium canescens subsp. sublaeve include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
